# Generated by Cookiecutter

```python
# ============================================================
# This file was generated by cookiecutter-templates/cookies/bootstrap.
# Please do not modify but update the cookiecutter.json and regenerate.
# For example additional resources to terraform should be added through further terraform files instead.
#
# @generated
# @version v3.3.79
# @see https://gitlab.breuni.de/itops/oct/cookiecutter/cookiecutter-templates
# ============================================================
```

## Usage

To regenerate edit the cookiecutter.json and execute the following command:

```bash
GITLAB_TOKEN=<GITLAB_TOKEN> cookiecutter --replay-file cookiecutter.json --overwrite-if-exists \
    https://gitlab.breuni.de/itops/oct/cookiecutter/cookiecutter-templates \
    --checkout v3.3.79 \
    --directory cookies/bootstrap
```

Please check all changes before committing as some files contain no extension point and could have been modified.

## Extension Points

1. Set the value `enable_extension_points` in your cookiecutter.json to `true`.
1. Create a `custom.tf` if none yet exists.
1. Add a locals entry `extensions` of type object and add the desired values to the relevant keys.
1. Take a look at [example_extensions.tf](example_extensions.tf) for an overview with examples.
